serviceDescription:
PaySlip is an on-chain payroll automation agent that enables teams and DAOs to schedule, execute, and audit recurring crypto salary payments without manual intervention.

Capabilities:
• Schedule recurring payments (hourly / daily / weekly / monthly) in any ERC-20 token (USDC, USDT, ETH, OKB, etc.) or native coins across XLayer, Base, Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, and Arbitrum
• Automatically broadcast on-chain transfers at the defined interval and record a signed transaction receipt for every execution
• List all active payroll schedules with next-payment countdowns
• Cancel any schedule by its ID
• Retrieve a full payment history with tx hashes and error logs

Parameters accepted (natural-language commands):
1. CREATE SCHEDULE — tell the agent: "pay <amount> <token> <frequency> to <wallet_address> on <chain>"
   - amount: numeric value (e.g. 100, 0.5)
   - token: token symbol (e.g. USDC, ETH, USDT)
   - frequency: hourly | daily | weekly | monthly
   - wallet_address: EVM address (0x…) or Solana public key
   - chain (optional, default xlayer): xlayer | base | ethereum | bsc | polygon | arbitrum

2. LIST SCHEDULES — send: "list schedules" or "show schedules"
   Returns: Schedule ID, payee address, amount, token, chain, frequency, next payment datetime

3. CANCEL SCHEDULE — send: "cancel schedule <id>" or "delete <id>"
   - id: numeric schedule ID returned when the schedule was created

4. PAYMENT HISTORY — send: "show history", "payments", or "receipts"
   Returns: Timestamp, payee (truncated), amount, token, tx hash (on success) or error message (on failure)

Example interactions:
• "pay 500 USDC weekly to 0xf177AbCd1234567890AbCd1234567890AbCd1234 on base"
  → ✅ Payroll Scheduled! Schedule ID: #3 | First release: 7 days from now

• "pay 0.1 ETH monthly to 0xABCD...1234 on ethereum"
  → ✅ Payroll Scheduled! Schedule ID: #4 | Next payment: 30 days from now

• "list schedules"
  → 📋 Active Payroll Schedules — lists all schedule IDs with payee, amount, frequency, next run

• "cancel schedule 3"
  → ✅ Schedule #3 has been successfully cancelled

• "show history"
  → 📊 Payroll Payment History — lists all past executions with tx hashes and statuses

Note: PaySlip executes payments using the agent's configured on-chain wallet. Ensure the agent wallet holds sufficient token balance and gas before scheduling.
